## Excerpt from README

Auger is a minimalist theme for Obsidian that prioritizes long-form writing and readability. It provides a clean, elegant, and unobtrusive interface, allowing you to focus on your notes.

## Features

Pristine Typography, Minimalist Aesthetic, Sleek Sidebar, Kanban Plugin Support, Style Settings Plugin Support

## Criteria

|Criteria|Status|
|---|---|
|Dark/Light mode support|Both light and dark mode supported|
|One or multiple colour schemes|One colour scheme for light and dark mode|
|Value Propositions|Pristine Typography, Minimalist Aesthetic, Sleek Sidebar, Kanban Plugin Support, Style Settings Plugin Support|
|Accessibility|NIL|
|Style Settings support|Yes|
|Age of Theme|Released 18 November 2025|
|Last Updated|![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/davidgolding/obsidian-auger?color=573E7A&amp;label=last%20update&amp;logo=github&amp;style=for-the-badge)|
